title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 301.112 - Service agent obtaining certificate of ownership for owner, definition
text:
301.112.  Service agent obtaining certificate of ownership for owner, definition. — For the purpose of sections 301.112 to 301.119, "motor vehicle title service agent" shall be deemed to mean any person who acts as an agent for a fee in obtaining a certificate of ownership of a motor vehicle.
(L. 1984 S.B. 416 § 1)
